positive: A minimalist, flat vector illustration of three happy sloths hanging from jungle vines, accompanied by stylized tropical leaves and small geometric suns. Clean lines, limited color palette of pastel blues and greens, suitable for screen printing or sticker design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, shading, realism, complex textures, gradients, shadows
